mapper.sql: id, job_name, job_group, class_name, method_name, method_params, cron_expression, description, status, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_job_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_job_info WHERE status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_job_info SET job_name = #{jobName}, job_group = #{jobGroup}, class_name = #{className}, method_name = #{methodName}, method_params = #{methodParams}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
